2606.26803.title: From Vajrayana Tara to Bengali Baul: A Computational Study of Lexical Transmission Across Buddhist, Shakta, and Vaishnava Traditions in Bengal
2606.26803.paper_summary: We present a computational corpus study of vocabulary relationships across eight tradition layers of Bengali and Sanskrit devotional literature spanning the 8th to 19th centuries, encompassing Buddhist Vajrayana, Shakta Tantra, Vaishnava, and Baul traditions. Using a corpus of 75 texts and TF-IDF character n-gram vectorization with cosine similarity analysis, we address the historically argued but previously unquantified claim that Buddhist Vajrayana vocabulary survived the collapse of the Pala monasteries and was absorbed into the Shakta Tantra tradition of Bengal. The central finding is a specificity result: the Gitagovinda (Vaishnava Sanskrit, 12th century) has zero cosine similarity to Shakta Kali texts, while Bridge Tara texts (Buddhist-Shakta transitional, same century, same language) have cosine similarity 0.54 to Shakta Kali. This 8.5-fold contrast between two Sanskrit traditions from the same century demonstrates that the Buddhist-Shakta vocabulary overlap is not a generic property of Sanskrit devotional literature but is specific to the Buddhist-Shakta transmission chain. Three Brihannilatantra Tara texts show Shakta-to-Buddhist vocabulary ratios of 2.0 to 4.0, constituting measurable evidence of lexical transition within that chain. Ramprasad Sen's 18th-century Bengali Kali songs preserve Buddhist vocabulary residue including 56 occurrences of Tara alongside 103 occurrences of Kali. The Vaishnava Bengali tradition contributes a parallel chain to modern Baul vocabulary (similarity 0.29), slightly weaker than the Buddhist Sahajiya chain via Charyapada (0.31). These results provide the first quantitative multi-tradition corroboration of historically argued Buddhist-Shakta syncretism in Bengal.
2606.26803.paper_summary_zh: 我們呈現了一項計算語料庫研究，探討了從8世紀到19世紀的孟加拉和梵文宗教文學中八個傳統層次的詞彙關係，涵蓋了佛教金剛乘、女神教、維希努教和巴烏爾傳統。使用75篇文本的語料庫和TF-IDF字符n-gram向量化以及餘弦相似性分析，我們針對歷史上有爭議但之前未量化的主張進行研究，即佛教金剛乘詞彙在帕拉寺院崩潰後存活下來並被吸收到孟加拉的女神教傳統中。核心發現是一個特異性結果：吉他歌頌（維希努教梵文，12世紀）與女神卡莉文本的餘弦相似性為零，而橋塔拉文本（佛教-女神教過渡，同世紀，同語言）與女神卡莉的餘弦相似性為0.54。這兩個來自同一世紀的梵文傳統之間8.5倍的對比顯示，佛教-女神教的詞彙重疊並不是梵文宗教文學的一個通用特性，而是特定於佛教-女神教的傳遞鏈。三篇《布里漢尼拉坦特拉塔拉》文本顯示女神教到佛教的詞彙比率為2.0到4.0，構成了該鏈中詞彙轉換的可測量證據。拉姆普拉薩德·森的18世紀孟加拉卡莉歌曲保留了佛教詞彙殘留，包括56次出現的塔拉和103次出現的卡莉。維希努教的孟加拉傳統為現代巴烏爾詞彙提供了一條平行鏈（相似性0.29），略弱於通過查雅帕達的佛教薩哈吉亞鏈（0.31）。這些結果提供了對歷史上有爭議的孟加拉佛教-女神教合成主義的首次定量多傳統證據。
2606.26803.author: Joy Bose et.al.
